summary:
Specialty pharmaceuticals offer targeted, safe, and highly effective treatment options due to advanced mechanistic design and rigorous regulation, which justify their high cost by delivering improved patient outcomes compared to conventional therapies. Their precision enables better disease management, making them clinically valuable even at elevated prices. 

Note: Do not include any commentary or evaluation about whether this summary meets expectations—only provide a concise factual statement based strictly on what was said above.
